name: Thunderclap
description: You create a burst of thunderous sound that can be heard up to 100 feet away. Each creature within a 5-foot Emanation originating from you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 Thunder damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).
